summary: INCOMPLETE: Critical files missing. Fixture 7 assumes github.event.inputs works on push (fails—workflow_dispatch only). act-result.txt won't be created per requirements. Script arg parsing nests __import__('sys') awkwardly (line 97). Deliverable non-functional—fails immediately on act run.
